mapper.insert:
insert into lesson_schedule_setting (schedule_id, weeks, start_time, end_time, room_id) values
(#{item.scheduleId}, #{item.weeks}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.roomId})

insert into lesson_schedule (class_id,course_id,teacher_ids, assistant_ids, start_date, end_date, dec_lesson_count, times, exclude_holiday, state, creator, editor, add_time, edit_time) values (#{classId}, #{courseId},#{teacherId}, #{assistantId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{descLessonCount}, #{times}, #{excludeHoliday}, #{state}, #{creator}, #{editor}, #{addTime}, #{editTime})
